answers.value: I am submitting this complaint regarding ongoing excessive late-night noise and disruptive behavior originating from my next-door neighbor, Evan Thompson in Apt 3A, with the most recent and worst incident occurring on the night of 2026-01-15 around 11:45 PM.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: For context, I live in Apt 3B and share a bedroom wall with Mr. Thompson’s living room; over the past three months he has hosted frequent gatherings on weeknights that typically start around 9:00 PM and often continue past 1:00 or 2:00 AM, despite posted quiet hours of 10:00 PM.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: On the night in question, I was attempting to sleep because I had to be up at 5:30 AM for my job as a medical billing specialist at Riverton Family Clinic, but the music from his apartment was so loud that my bedroom wall was vibrating, and I could clearly hear song lyrics and bass beats through the wall.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: In addition to the loud music, there was constant shouting, laughter, and what sounded like people running up and down the hallway outside our units; at one point around midnight, I heard glass break and several people yelling profanities directly outside my door.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: I initially tried to handle the situation calmly by knocking on Mr. Thompson’s door at approximately 12:05 AM; when he answered, he appeared intoxicated and dismissed my concerns, saying, "It’s a Friday night, relax, we’re just having fun," and then turned the music down only slightly for about 10 minutes before turning it back up again.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: After the noise resumed at nearly the same volume, I attempted to call the non-emergency number for the courtesy officer listed in the move-in packet at approximately 12:30 AM; the courtesy officer did come to the building, and I heard him knock and speak briefly with Mr. Thompson, after which the music was turned down again but the loud talking, shouting, and hallway traffic continued.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: Because this is not an isolated event but part of a pattern, I want to document that similar, though slightly less extreme, parties occurred on at least four other occasions in the past month (roughly on 2025-12-20, 2025-12-31, 2026-01-03, and 2026-01-10), each time going well past quiet hours and making it difficult for me and my 10-year-old daughter to sleep.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: My daughter, Sofia, has woken up crying on two separate nights because of the shouting and loud thuds coming from next door, and she has started asking if we can move because she feels scared when she hears angry voices and banging on the walls late at night.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: The chronic lack of sleep has begun to affect my work performance—I have been late twice in the last month because I overslept after being kept awake, and my supervisor has commented on me looking exhausted and making minor data entry errors that are unusual for me.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: I am requesting that management formally address this ongoing noise and disturbance issue with Mr. Thompson, reminding him of the community’s quiet hours policy and, if necessary, issuing a written warning or taking further action so that my family and I can reasonably enjoy our home without repeated late-night disruptions.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: I am willing to cooperate fully with any follow-up, including providing the informal log I have been keeping of dates and approximate times of these disturbances, and I respectfully ask that this complaint be kept as confidential as possible to avoid creating direct conflict between neighbors.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form
